message:
refactor(plan): rename CandidateId to CandidateActionId, evolve Assignment/Journal schemas

Rename CandidateId to CandidateActionId throughout the plan module.
Update CandidateAction to use StepAction instead of DispatchMechanism,
add requested_by: MissionActorRole field, and remove labels. Add
assigned_by and escalation fields to Assignment. Rename assigned_at_ms
to created_at_ms.

Evolve journal entry schemas:
  - LifecycleTransition: kind → transition_kind
  - KillSwitchChange: from/to → level_from/level_to
  - AssignmentOutcome: assignment_id → AssignmentId(...), split outcome
    into outcome_before + outcome_after
  - ControlCommand: simple String → full MissionControlCommand/Decision

Change journal.append() API to accept &str role strings instead of
MissionActorRole enums. Remove seq parameter from replay_from_checkpoint.
Make checkpoint() and recovery_marker() return Result.

Update MissionDispatchMechanism variants: RobotSend gains paste_mode,
RobotWaitFor → WaitCondition, InternalLockAcquire/Release rename
resource_id → lock_name, InternalStoreData.value → serde_json::Value.

Add MissionOwnership::solo(agent) convenience constructor.

Gate two mission_loop tests on #[cfg(feature = "subprocess-bridge")].

Update all test fixtures in orchestration_integration.rs and
proptest_pause_resume.rs to match the new schemas.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
